name: Prepare Query
func:
msg.topic = `
    SELECT 
        node_id AS ID, 
        water_level AS waterlevel, 
        water_level_status AS waterlevel_status,
        recorded_at AS time
    FROM WaterLevelLogs 
    ORDER BY recorded_at DESC 
    LIMIT 10
`;
return msg;

SELECT node_id IN (3, 4)
func:
msg.topic = "SELECT last_update,node_id,location_id,install_place FROM NodeInfo WHERE node_id IN (3, 4)";

return msg;

name: SELECT last_update
func:
msg.topic = "SELECT last_update,node_id,location_id,install_place FROM NodeInfo WHERE status = 'active'";


return msg;
